items.definition_en: A pencil is a tool for writing or drawing.
items.example_en: I always keep a pencil in my backpack.

items.definition_en: A notebook is a book with blank pages for writing notes.
items.example_en: She writes her homework in her notebook.

items.definition_en: An eraser is used to remove pencil marks.
items.example_en: He used an eraser to fix his mistake.

items.definition_en: A ruler is used to draw straight lines.
items.example_en: I need a ruler for my math class.

items.definition_en: A sharpener helps you to make pencils sharp.
items.example_en: She lost her sharpener yesterday.

items.definition_en: A pen is a tool for writing with ink.
items.example_en: Please bring a blue pen to the test.

items.definition_en: A backpack is a bag carried on your back.
items.example_en: He carries his books in his backpack.

items.definition_en: A folder is used to hold and organize papers.
items.example_en: She put all her drawings in a red folder.

items.definition_en: A calculator helps with math problems.
items.example_en: We need a calculator for the test.

items.definition_en: A glue stick is used to stick paper together.
items.example_en: I need a glue stick for my art project.

items.definition_en: A marker is a pen with colored ink.
items.example_en: They use markers to draw pictures in class.

items.definition_en: A highlighter is used to mark important words.
items.example_en: He used a highlighter to mark new words.

items.definition_en: A binder holds loose papers together.
items.example_en: She stores her notes in a big binder.

items.definition_en: Sticky notes are small pieces of paper with glue.
items.example_en: He uses sticky notes to remember things.

items.definition_en: A lunchbox is a container for carrying food.
items.example_en: She brings a sandwich in her lunchbox.

items.definition_en: A pencil case is used to keep pens and pencils.
items.example_en: Her pencil case is full of colorful pens.

items.definition_en: A water bottle is used for carrying water.
items.example_en: He drinks from his water bottle at school.

items.definition_en: Scissors are used for cutting paper.
items.example_en: She cut out shapes using scissors.

items.definition_en: A whiteboard is a smooth board for writing with markers.
items.example_en: The teacher wrote our names on the whiteboard.

items.definition_en: A paperclip holds pieces of paper together.
items.example_en: He attached his homework with a paperclip.
